message:
refactor(auth): one token per session, role server-side, per-session JWT signing

Replace two-token-per-session model (editor + viewer) with single 256-bit
permanent token. Role is now a server-side session attribute instead of being
encoded in tokens. JWTs contain only session_id + expiry, signed with the
session's permanent token as HMAC-SHA256 key (no separate jwt_secret).

Server (auth.zig, main.zig, http_server.zig, cli.zig):
- Remove TokenType enum, token prefixes, and jwt_secret
- Session struct: editor_token/viewer_token → token (32 bytes) + role
- ShareLink: token_type → role
- JWT two-pass validation: parse session_id, look up session, verify signature
- Wire format: 64-char hex token + role byte
- Backwards-compatible auth.json migration (old format discarded)

Client (types.ts, mux.ts, App.svelte, AdminSharesDialog.svelte):
- Session: editorToken/viewerToken → token + role
- Protocol parser updated for new wire format
- ShareDialog shows spinner while fetching share URL from server
